# attachments

**Instance Property**

All attachments for this object.

## Declaration

```swift
var attachments: CMAttachmentBearerAttachments { get }
```

## Processing Attachments

- **propagateAttachments(to:)**: Copies all propagable attachments from one attachment bearer object to another.
- **CMAttachmentBearerAttachments**: A structure that contains attachments.

items.description: Copies all propagable attachments from one attachment bearer object to another.
items.name: propagateAttachments(to:)

title: attachments
